title: macac #4549
definition:
1) to dissolve, melt
    1a) (Qal) to waste away
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to melt, vanish, drop off, melt away
        1b2) to faint, grow fearful (fig.)
        1b3) wasted, worthless (participle)
    1c) (Hiphil) to cause to melt
